name: Digital Mulligans
about: Digital Mulligans is an indoor golf simulator venue located at 771 Rt. 15 S., 2nd Floor, Lake Hopatcong, NJ. The facility provides access to golf simulation technology for various purposes, including league play, individual practice, and private events. They offer services related to simulator design and build, suggesting a focus on both the user experience and the technical setup of their equipment. The venue caters to a range of activities from casual play to organized leagues and mobile events.
why_golfers_like_it: Convenient indoor golf experience regardless of weather
Access to organized leagues and competitive events
Availability of mobile services for off-site events
Professional simulator design and build services

faq.answer: The website does not explicitly state a policy on outside food or drink, so it is best to contact the venue directly for confirmation.

faq.answer: The website does not provide information on the average time it takes to play a round, so this detail would need to be confirmed directly with the venue.
